assertions.description: boost.sch implements a discrete boost converter using an IRF740 power MOSFET (Q1, lib_id: Transistor_FET:IRF740), a 470uH inductor (L1), a HER106 rectifier diode (D9), a 4.7uF/350V output capacitor (C9), a gate resistor R2 (22 ohm), and a voltage divider (R1=300k / R4=4.7k) for feedback. The analyzer detects the voltage divider correctly but reports transistor_circuits: []. The IRF740 is a well-known TO-220 power MOSFET and this is a straightforward switched-mode boost converter topology that should be detectable as a transistor switching circuit.
